design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Metroidvania through its core metroidvania loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Combat pacing should match genre tempo and readable threat language.
constraints: Signature mechanics must reinforce genre fantasy
gdd_outline.core_loop: Explore interconnected regions, defeat bosses to gain abilities, backtrack to open shortcuts and secrets, and rest at checkpoints between combat encounters.
gdd_outline.economy_notes: Tune earn/spend to genre tension targets.
gdd_outline.overview: Metroidvania games combine interconnected world exploration with ability-gated progression. Players backtrack through a single large map as new movement and combat tools unlock previously inaccessible routes.
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Follow signature mechanic dependencies across early, mid, and late phases.

mechanics.expression: Hallmark spatial locks requiring specific movement or combat abilities.
mechanics.map_notes: Hallmark spatial locks requiring specific movement or combat abilities.

mechanics.expression: Revisiting prior areas with new tools reveals secrets and shortcuts.
mechanics.map_notes: Revisiting prior areas with new tools reveals secrets and shortcuts.

mechanics.expression: Upgrades found through exploration rather than linear stage rewards.
mechanics.map_notes: Upgrades found through exploration rather than linear stage rewards.

mechanics.expression: Major bosses guard ability unlocks and story milestones.
mechanics.map_notes: Major bosses guard ability unlocks and story milestones.

mechanics.expression: Safe rest points for save, heal, and respawn anchoring.
mechanics.map_notes: Safe rest points for save, heal, and respawn anchoring.

mechanics.expression: Health depletion creates tension between checkpoints.
mechanics.map_notes: Health depletion creates tension between checkpoints.

mechanics.expression: Optional combat rooms and resource farming routes.
mechanics.map_notes: Optional combat rooms and resource farming routes.

narrative.core_loop: Explore interconnected regions, defeat bosses to gain abilities, backtrack to open shortcuts and secrets, and rest at checkpoints between combat encounters.
narrative.description: Metroidvania games combine interconnected world exploration with ability-gated progression. Players backtrack through a single large map as new movement and combat tools unlock previously inaccessible routes.

pacing.early: Teach ability gated exploration with low failure cost.
pacing.late: Test full signature loop mastery under peak constraints.
pacing.mid: Combine supporting mechanics and raise resource or pattern pressure.

ui_menus.map_notes: Interconnected world map with fog reveal.
Charm or gear loadout at benches.

variables.expression: Health lost between benches drives tension.

variants.label: Roguelite Metroidvania
variants.notes: Run-based structure with ability gates per attempt.
